# Decision3

> Decision3 builds open-source payment infrastructure for the autonomous AI agent economy. Agents need to pay, remember, and be accountable — we build the open layer for this.

## Core pages
- [Home](https://decision3.ai): What Decision3 is and who it's for
- [Products](https://decision3.ai/#products): Interouter and EvoAgent overview

## What makes Decision3 different
- Live on Algorand mainnet — verified x402 payments, not a demo
- Interouter: open-source x402 middleware (MIT license, on npm as @decision3/interouter-core), facilitator-agnostic, cross-chain compatible
- EvoAgent: self-evolving AI agent, first real customer of Interouter's payment layer — proof by dogfooding, not theorizing
- 59/59 tests passing, v0.1.7

## Contact
- GitHub: https://github.com/decision3-ai
- X: https://x.com/DeFlosvictor
